Silhouettes by Chris Casey

Date: Wednesday, April 29, 2026
Time: 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM
Ages: All ages

A Lost Art, Live in the Bookstore

Silhouette artist Chris Casey is setting up shop at The Wandering Lantern for one afternoon. Sit still for just a few minutes and walk away with a hand-cut silhouette portrait — a timeless keepsake.

What to Expect

  • Hand-cut silhouette portraits by professional artist Chris Casey
  • Each sitting takes just a few minutes
  • A beautiful, one-of-a-kind keepsake for your family

Details

  • 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM
  • Book your time slot in advance — reserve through Eventbrite!
  • Walk-ins welcome if slots are available.

Secure your spot before time runs out!

Purchase Tickets
